title: Craftable Nether star tweak
description: Nether Star  is a Minecraft mod that adds new crafting recipe for the rare and powerful Nether Star.
body:
Nether Start is a simple mod that adds a crafting recipe for the Nether Star.

Now you don’t have to fight the Wither every time – just gather the needed ingredients and craft it!

Perfect for players who want an easier way to get Nether Stars in survival mode.
![craft of nether star](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65444d1ea184cdb16731173830e5d40153a0f2d.png)

My discord is here: rollsroyce0991
